summary: Backend test pass for Catatan Keuangan Asatidz. Seeded two users (Ustadz Ahmad + Ustadzah Fatimah) and their sessions directly in MongoDB, then executed 25 pytest cases via the public EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL covering auth (Bearer guard, /auth/me, /auth/gelar, /auth/reminder), categories (10 defaults, create/delete custom, default-protect), transactions (validation, create→GET, filters year/month/type/category/q, update, delete→404), data isolation (user B cannot read/update/delete user A tx), reports (summary, range with biggest_expense_category), Excel and PDF binary exports (correct content-type + magic bytes PK/%PDF), reminder status flow, and voice/parse validation (401 without auth, 400 on invalid base64, 400 on too-short payload). 25/25 passed.

minor.issue: Date range uses string compare with '-31' suffix; safe for current usage but breaks if/when tx date >to_year-to_month-31 is queried for short months. Cosmetic only.
voice_note_base64 stored on every transaction can bloat documents; consider GridFS or omitting from list responses.

action_items: No backend fixes required. Frontend was not tested per request scope.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 870+ lines; consider splitting into routers (auth/transactions/reports/voice) for maintainability.
Voice endpoint stores raw audio in tx documents (voice_note_base64) — for production consider object storage.
@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; migrate to lifespan handler.
Excel/PDF date filter uses 'YYYY-MM-31' suffix string boundary which is functionally fine but slightly hacky.
seed_data_creation: Seeded users user_test_asatidz (token test_token_asatidz_v1) and user_test_asatidzah (token test_token_asatidzah_v1) with 10 default categories each. Session-scope fixture cleans transactions and custom categories before & after suite to keep DB tidy.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL env var as base. Two seeded users available via fixtures auth_a / auth_b. Voice endpoint LLM/Whisper paths beyond input validation were not exercised (no audio fixture).
